products: Master Hacker Internet Terrorism (Core Publishing Inc.)
Product Recovery CD-ROM for IBM ThinkPad 570E MT 2644
Technical Guide to Hard Drives & Subsystems
Microsoft Developer Network BackOffice Test Platform - INTL
Microsoft Windows 95 & Microsoft Plus! With USB Support

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Felix Bilstein - yara-signator at cocacoding dot com

crowdsourced_ai_results.analysis: This sample is a Remote Access Trojan (RAT) or backdoor. It exhibits structured command-and-control (C2) behavior, specifically within function sub_40c6c0, which parses commands such as 'drive', 'list', 'upload', and 'open' for remote file system manipulation. It performs internet connectivity checks using Google DNS (8.8.8.8) in sub_40b79a and references a likely C2 domain 'hi.getgo2.com' in sub_408dd9. Furthermore, the binary imports high-risk APIs for process injection (VirtualAllocEx, WriteProcessMemory) and utilizes a structured logging format (%d|%s|%04d/%02d/%02d...) in sub_407cdc, typically used for formatting stolen data or system metadata for exfiltration.
